summary: Completed frontend testing for iteration 13: Home page redesign and Search page with Map view. All 14 features passed. Home page has hero with trust stats, categories, 'Cómo funciona' steps, cities, testimonials, trust badges and business CTA. Search page has Lista/Mapa toggle with working OpenStreetMap integration.

backend_issues.notes: Backend not tested per request (frontend only). Previous iterations confirmed backend working.

passed_tests: Hero section with badge 'La plataforma #1 de reservas en México'
Trust stats visible: 2,500+ Negocios, 50,000+ Reservas, 4.8 Calificación
Search bar with service input, city input, and search button
Categories section with 8 category cards (Belleza, Salud, Fitness, etc.)
Cómo funciona section with 4 steps: Busca, Elige, Reserva, Disfruta
Cities section with 6 city cards: CDMX, Guadalajara, Monterrey, Cancún, Puebla, Mérida
Testimonials section with 4 testimonial cards (María, Carlos, Ana, Roberto)
Trust badges bar: Pagos seguros, Reseñas verificadas, Reserva 24/7, +2,500 negocios
Business CTA section with 'Registrar mi negocio' button
Search page (/search) loads in list view by default with results-list
Lista/Mapa toggle buttons present and functional
Map view shows OpenStreetMap with business markers and side list
Filters sidebar works: Category (9 options), City (11 options), Sort, Rating slider
Admin login page (/admin/login) still works with 2FA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested Home and Search page redesigns. Key data-testids: home-page, categories-section (category-card-{slug}), how-it-works-section, cities-section (city-card-{slug}), testimonials-section (testimonial-{0-3}), trust-section, business-cta-section (register-business-cta), featured-section, search-page, results-list, results-map-view, search-map, view-list-toggle, view-map-toggle, filter-category, filter-city, filter-sort, filter-rating. Map uses react-leaflet with OpenStreetMap tiles. Test business slug: test-business-5ecc65fc. App URL: https://marketplace-test-21.preview.emergentagent.com
